questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including the products or services you supply or acquire, the geographic areas in which you operate and any current or recent commercial relationships with Craig Mostyn and/or Patmore Feeds. Please indicate whether you supply to, acquire from, compete with or otherwise operate at the same level of the supply chain as either party.

questions.section: Questions for customers of pelletised pig feed
questions.text: Describe where your operations are located and the volume of pelletised pig feed that you acquire per year. Please identify the suppliers from whom you source this feed and the approximate volumes supplied by each.

questions.section: Questions for customers of pelletised pig feed
questions.text: What are the main factors that determine your choice of pelletised pig feed supplier? For example, price, reliability of supply, proximity, feed specifications, and contractual terms.

questions.section: Questions for customers of pelletised pig feed
questions.text: Describe what is involved in switching suppliers of pelletised pig feed based on your experience? For example, time required, costs, contractual constraints, or risks to animal health or production.

questions.section: Questions for customers of pelletised pig feed
questions.text: If your current main supplier of pelletised pig feed were to reduce the volumes supplied to you (whether temporarily or on an ongoing basis) what alternative sourcing options you would consider? If this has occurred in the past, please describe what you did in response.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of pelletised livestock feed
questions.text: Provide the location of your operations, the types of pelletised livestock feed that you supply, your annual output, maximum production capacity and typical capacity utilisation, and the proportion of your output sold to Craig Mostyn and/or Patmore Feeds.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of pelletised livestock feed
questions.text: If Craig Mostyn were to cease or materially reduce the amount of pelletised feed purchased from you following the Acquisition, describe how your business would respond in practice. For example, whether you would seek alternative customers, adjust output levels, or change investment plans.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of pelletised livestock feed
questions.text: Does your business supply pelletised livestock feed to third parties only, or does it also supply feed internally to affiliated livestock production operations? If it supplies internally, what proportion of total supply is internal?

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of pelletised livestock feed
questions.text: Describe what would be required for your business to expand production of pelletised pig feed, or, if you do not currently supply pelletised pig feed, what would be required to switch production from other livestock feed to pelletised pig feed. Please include timeframes, costs, and any operational or regulatory constraints, and the commercial conditions under which such expansion or switching would be undertaken.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including any views or concerns on the effect of the Acquisition on competition in Australia.
